title: WCRAFT
body:
Этот ресурспак создан специально для WCRAFT. В будущих версиях будет всё больше изменений. Изменения:
- Главное меню
- Тотемы

Чтобы ресурспак работал БЕЗ оптифайна, необходим этот мод: https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

Как переименовать тотем? Также, как названа текстура в самом ресурспаке (assets/minecraft/optifine/cit/...)


This resource pack was created specifically for WCRAFT. Gradually new versions will be published with more and more changes. Changes:
- Main menu
- Totems

To make the resource pack work WITHOUT optifine, you need this mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn




**AGREEMENT**

You're allowed to:
- Use this RP to take screenshots and videos. But if possible (not necessary), leave the name of the RP and a link in the description.
- Modify RP for personal use. But without modifying existing files.

You're not allowed to:
- Post RPs on other resources without my express permission.
- Distribute shaders link other than Modrinth link.
- Claim (and rename) the RP (or its code) as your own.
- Use monetized URL shorteners to my site or files.
